blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,428 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 16" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
